title: Graph Typing Contract
description: Kernel typing schema for graph node types, edge types, and relation typing rules. Typing only — no projection, materialization, or query logic.

node_types.description: Canonical set of graph node types

edge_types.description: Canonical set of graph edge types

node_required_fields.description: Required fields for every graph node

edge_required_fields.description: Required fields for every graph edge

enrichment_edge_types.description: Edge types derived from enrichment (not hard runtime facts)
